'''Bogey Squad''' was a [[Squad/Legends|squad]] of [[Clone scout trooper/Legends|clone scout troopers]] under the overall command of [[Clone Commander/Legends|Commander]] [[Faie/Legends|Faie]] during the [[Great Jedi Purge/Legends|Great Jedi Purge]] to execute [[Order 66/Legends|Order 66]] against former [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[General/Legends|General]] [[Quinlan Vos/Legends|Quinlan Vos]] on [[Kashyyyk/Legends|Kashyyyk]]. All of the men were killed in action by Master Vos and the [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiee]], [[Chak (Wookiee)|Chak]]. One was eaten by an [[Anakkona/Legends|anakkona]] which Vos used [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] to [[Animal bond|control]]. The squad consisted of [[Bogey 1212]], [[Bogey 3856]], [[Bogey 4409]], [[Bogey 5632]], and [[Bogey 9662]].<ref name="Republic 83" />
